name: Penne Pasta with Sun-Dried Tomatoes and Chile
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Sun-dried tomatoes, cut into slivers
1/2 cup Black olives, cured in oil, pitted and halved
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients, except the cheese and pasta, in a large bowl and let sit at room temperature for a couple of hours to blend the flavors.
2. Cook the pasta in 4 quarts of boiling salted water until tender but still firm - 'al dente'. Drain.
3. Toss the pasta with the sauce and cheese until well coated and serve.
